title: Publicly available boards API
excerpt:
Get boards endpoint shows me whether a board is shared/private etc but I want to know 
if there is a way to see which boards are shared with anonymous links?

posts.author: arad (arad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Get boards endpoint shows me whether a board is shared/private etc but I want to know
if there is a way to see which boards are shared with anonymous links?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @arad,

Welcome to the community! I hope you like it her

What are you referring to when you say “Anonymous links”?

You can send a screenshot for reference if you want

posts.author: arad (arad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Matias.Monday,

Thank you very much.

What I was referring to is when a board is publicly shared to anyone with a link.

I want to get all publicly available boards across my organization

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @arad,

If what you want to know is which boards have been shared with a “Shareable link” such as https://view.monday.com/401111190-1234567asdf8d11114?r=use1, that can not be done.

You can not get that information with the API.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
